title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Doctor to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
